specific_mechanism: Coptic stitch joins signatures via chain stitches without spine glue; allows full opening and selective signature replacement without rebinding
llm_application: LLM model-merging via Coptic-style modular stitching: bind sub-modules with weight-space chain-stitches that allow individual replacement without retraining the full model.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes bookbinding spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
